rawIntent:
Fix golden principle breach in the affected file: [review/security] Use of 'exec' for command execution can lead to command injection vulnerabilities. Hint: Consider using a safer alternative like 'execFile' or properly sanitize inputs.. Don't use exec command, use another safe command
You need also to update gihub action file to set node version to 22

successCriteria.description: The use of 'exec' is replaced with 'execFile' or inputs are properly sanitized to prevent command injection vulnerabilities.
The GitHub Action file is updated to set the Node.js version to 22.

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
Audit records: All state-changing operations write an audit record.
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing.
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data.
RBAC enforcement: All API endpoints enforce role-based access control.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
outOfScope: Everything outside the specific file mentioned for the 'exec' command fix
Everything outside the GitHub Action file for Node.js version update
